summary:
ISS-1325 is a stale duplicate. The E-PRED-C fabricated citation in WIN-012 detail_evidence was already removed and replaced with verified PRED-TIER-2 language (plus a κ-kinematic self-contradiction that exceeds the curmudgeon's H1 recommendation) by decider self-apply at commit b4fa494 (2026-04-21 ~06:39Z). ISS-1325 was created at 2026-04-21T14:30:15Z by a later decider run ingesting the curmudgeon c5 review without noticing that the earlier self-apply had already patched the hole. Current origin/main (commit 02703fa) contains zero occurrences of E-PRED-C in WIN-012. No further patch is required for the primary target.

COMPANION FINDING (filed as separate new_issue proposal): the same phantom "E-PRED-C" label still appears in WIN-014 detail_evidence, in a paragraph about the Aug 2026 eclipse. WIN-014 was out of scope for the curmudgeon's WIN-012.c5 review but carries the identical citation-integrity defect. Proposed replacement text that uses the verified PRED-TIER-3 label ("SG contact-phase κ test, 10–13 µGal in Level-3 residuals") is included in EXP-206.json under companion_finding.recommended_replacement_text, and a separate issue-proposal has been filed to get WIN-014 on the decider's queue.
